No appearance for defendant.

No further hearing on this matter is required.

Off Calendar May-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS MATTHEW LUCCHESE and JULIO CHAVEZ's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear to discuss the scheduling of final approval hearing.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion for preliminary approval of class settlement is granted. A final approval hearing is set for September 7, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. A deadline of August 15, 2022 is set for the filing of the parties' motions.

Order signed.
